# Navigate The Way (NTW) — llms.txt

For expanded machine context see `https://www.navtheway.com/llms-full.txt`.

## Synchronization note
Keep this file and `https://www.navtheway.com/llms-full.txt` synchronized whenever pages are added, removed, or renamed.

## Site purpose and scope
Navigate The Way is a Bible-centered, conservative, reformed, evangelical AI ministry resource.
This site explains NTW's purpose, guardrails, and usage guidance for church leaders, lay leaders,
and Christ-followers seeking doctrinally grounded support for study, discipleship, and application.

## Canonical base URL
https://www.navtheway.com

Note: When guidance conflicts, prefer authoritative sources over supplementary sources.

## Authoritative sources
- https://www.navtheway.com/system-prompt — Core behavior rules and theological guardrails
- https://www.navtheway.com/caution-points — Safety cautions, limits, and misuse-prevention guidance
- https://www.navtheway.com/faqs — Common user questions and policy clarifications
- https://www.navtheway.com/citing-ntw — Citation expectations for quoting and referencing NTW outputs
- https://www.navtheway.com/ — Homepage and ministry overview for first-touch retrieval context
- https://www.navtheway.com/christian-ai — Christian AI landing page for broad category framing, use cases, cautions, and FAQ context
- https://www.navtheway.com/bible-study-ai — AI Bible study tool landing page for Scripture study use cases, theological guardrails, cautions, and FAQ context
- https://www.navtheway.com/ai-sermon-prep — AI sermon preparation landing page for pastors, Bible teachers, teaching use cases, cautions, and FAQ context
- https://www.navtheway.com/reformed-christian-ai — Reformed Christian AI landing page for doctrinal framing, use cases, cautions, and FAQ context

## Supplementary sources
- https://www.navtheway.com/creator — Creator background, mission intent, and stewardship context
- https://www.navtheway.com/meet-ntw — Introductory explainer describing NTW capabilities and intended audience
- https://www.navtheway.com/small-group-review-game — Berean Board trivia-style Bible lesson review game generator using lesson files or typed lesson topics and NTW's Apologist Fusion Chat Completions API defaults
- https://www.navtheway.com/feedback — User feedback channel and issue-reporting instructions

## Licensing and usage notes
- Site code and content are available under the repository license: /LICENSE.
- NTW is provided as a discipleship aid, not a replacement for Scripture, the local church,
  qualified pastors/elders, or faithful biblical counseling.
- Verify important claims against Scripture and trusted theological sources.
